raw_response:
Variant B is significantly more useful for a restaurant operator. While both reports correctly identify the major market shift with the new Food Hall, Variant B excels in its actionable, operator-focused intelligence. It moves beyond simply listing openings and closings to analyze the *reasons* for failure (e.g., flawed business models, infrastructure issues), providing valuable lessons. Its greatest strength lies in its deep dive into digital reputation, contrasting my restaurant's high Google ratings from locals with lower TripAdvisor scores from tourists who complain about wait times and inflexibility—a crucial insight. Most importantly, Variant B provides a concrete, four-point action plan, including managing wait time perception and starting to respond to online reviews, which are tasks I could implement immediately to protect and grow my business. This level of specific, operational advice makes it far superior to Variant A's more general, strategic overview.

{"winner": "B", "supporting_urls": ["https://www.trojmiasto.pl/", "https://mocniwgebie.com.pl/"]}
